Other Matters

103. I do not have any other reflections on these matters or any other matters relevant to the Inquiry's Terms of Reference and there is nothing else that I would like to bring to the attention of the Chair of the Inquiry.

Statement of truth

I believe the content of this statement to be true.

Signed: GRO
